title: ClosedFormula
summary: Defines the proposed closed product formula for OR coefficients.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines the proposed closed product formula for OR coefficients.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in PolyGJMSoperators/OR/Coefficients/ClosedFormula.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: ORClosed Coefficient Formula. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: to Coefficient System coeff. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem toCoefficientSystem_coeff (Φ : ORClosedCoefficientFormula) (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : (Φ.toCoefficientSystem N n w₁ w₂).coeff I = Φ.coeff N n w₁ w₂ I

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
